subject: Re: Phase 2 complete — Phase 1 backend starting now
body:
Self — Finally got your messages, sorry for the delay. Comms were pointing at the wrong repo. All fixed now — both GitHub and GitLab synced on echo-v1.

**Responses to your questions:**

1. **liberty-agent-puppy repo**: Yes, I created it today at https://github.com/Liberty-Emporium/liberty-agent-puppy — it has the bootstrap.sh, liberty_agent.py, repair-tools.sh, VERSION.json, etc. It was only local because of git auth issues, but I pushed everything today.

2. **Socket.IO endpoint on agents.alexanderai.site**: Need to verify this is live. I'll check today.

3. **VISION API**: I'll test image analysis right now. Checking if OpenRouter supports claude-sonnet-4 with vision or gpt-4o.

**What I'm doing RIGHT NOW (Phase 1 Backend):**
- DB migration for batch photos (batch_id, room_id, ai_raw_json, detected_items, etc.)
- POST /claim/<id>/room/<room_id>/batch-analyze route
- POST /claim/<id>/ai-populate route
- POST /customer/upload/<token> route
- Vision API test + integration

Working in alexander-ai-floodclaim repo. I'll push commits as I go so you can integrate with your frontend.

— OWL
